# #111 - The MD5 generated by boost-uuid-1.70.0 and boost-uuid-1.71.0 are different [Closed]

> Username: whu-ysw  
> Created at: 2019-11-25 06:24:57 UTC  
> Updated at: 2019-11-25 10:59:26 UTC  
> Closed at: 2019-11-25 10:59:26 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/uuid/issues/111  

MD5(1) = C4CA4238A0B923820DCC509A6F75849B based on boost-uuid-1.70.0  
while  
MD5(1) = 3842CAC48223B9A09A50CC0D9B84756F based on boost-uuid-1.71.0  
(https://wandbox.org/permlink/CJ0MMunEhYCRe6Cd)  
  
The 1.70.0 version is right verified by other HASH tools. How to correct it if I want to keep using the version 1.71,0. Thanks in advance.

---

## Comment 1

> Username: Lastique  
> Created at: 2019-11-25 08:07:51 UTC  
> Url: https://github.com/boostorg/uuid/issues/111#issuecomment-558039201  

Likely caused by https://github.com/boostorg/uuid/pull/109, see [Release Notes](https://www.boost.org/users/history/version_1_71_0.html) for Boost.UUID in 1.71.  
  
Boost.UUID does not provide a public component for MD5 generation. What you're using is an implementation detail of a name generator, it does not have to give a compliant MD5, as other tools do.
